title: Premium Pay and Additional Insurance Coverage. Seafarers sailing
content: 49 through areas declared by the Department as war zone, warlike and high-risk zones shall 50 be entitled to premium pay or its equivalent and war risk insurance coverage, the form of 51 which shall be determined by the Department. 52 53 This war risk insurance shall be provided by the shipowner/principal or LMA at no cost to 54 the seafarer. 55 56

metadata.source_file: [NOTICE TO PUBLIC] CLEAN DRAFT OF THE DMW SEABASED RULES.pdf
